description_long: This is a round, golden-brown pancake with a thick, fluffy appearance, served on a wooden board. The pancake is topped with several plump, pink shrimp arranged in a cluster, resting on a bed of green lettuce or leafy garnish. The surface of the pancake is slightly uneven, with visible flecks of green herbs baked into the batter. The wooden board has a carved, segmented design, giving it a rustic and sturdy look. The overall presentation is vibrant and appetizing, with the shrimp and garnish providing a striking contrast to the warm tones of the pancake and board.
description: A thick, golden pancake topped with shrimp and green garnish, served on a rustic wooden board. The presentation is colorful and appetizing.
description_view_0: The pancake is shown with shrimp and green garnish clearly visible on the left side, highlighting the segmented wooden board.
description_view_1: The shrimp topping is partially obscured, with the pancake and board dominating the view and the garnish barely visible.
description_view_2: The shrimp and garnish are visible from a different angle, with the pancake's surface and board details prominent.
description_view_3: The shrimp and green garnish are centered and fully visible, making the toppings the focal point of this view.
